title: XRP price trades in ‘value zone’ near $1.40 as whales pull $170M from exchanges
summary: Whales withdrew $170 million in XRP from Binance as the price holds a key $1.35-$1.40 accumulation and support zone.

title: UAE-linked ADI Chain gains Ledger support amid stablecoin growth
summary: The integration gives ADI token holders access to Ledger’s self-custody platform as ADI Chain expands its stablecoin and tokenized asset network.

title: Iran Deal Hopes Boost Emerging Market Assets as Oil Slides
summary: Emerging-market stocks and currencies rose Monday as signs that the US and Iran are nearing a deal to reopen the Strait of Hormuz pushed oil prices lower and boosted risk appetite.

title: Oil Slides as US Touts Progress on Deal Toward Reopening Hormuz
summary: West Texas Intermediate crude briefly fell below $90 a barrel for the first time in almost three weeks amid signs the US and Iran were progressing toward an agreement to reopen the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Famed iPhone, Sony Hacker Says AI Coding Agents Are a Disaster Waiting to Happen
